top_signals.title: ‘Humiliation’: Donald Trump battles claims his Iran deal is worse than Obama’s
top_signals.summary: US president’s critics ask if concessions to Tehran in purported agreement were worth four months of war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Market Poised for 'Hawkish' Fed Chair Warsh, Lyngen Says
top_signals.summary: Ian Lyngen, head of US rates strategy at BMO Capital Markets, discusses what to expect from the Federal Reserve’s first policy decision under Chair Kevin Warsh. "The energy shock remains extremely topical for monetary policymakers and will probably ultimately drive the tone of what we hear from Warsh," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
